domain: Bulgarian Rhodope gajda bagpipe (kaba gaida) — chanter (gaidanitsa) has conical bore with up to seven subtle changes along its length; flea-hole marmorka covered by left index finger raises any note by half step; drone + chanter + blowpipe; goatskin bag; regional bore-profile variants Thrace/Dobrudja high, Shope mid, Rhodope deep; defective bore (warped/cracked/miscoupled) produces resonance signature deviation from canonical regional profile
specific_mechanism: BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS: atlas-of-canonical-bore-profile attention-head defect detection. (1) Learn atlas of K canonical bore-profile centroids c_1, ..., c_K via k-means on healthy-head population (clean fine-tuned base). (2) Per-head bore profile p_h = concat(σ_1, σ_2/σ_1, θ_QK, spectral-shape-histogram(σ)) where σ are singular values of W_Q W_K^T. (3) Defect score d_h = min_k mahalanobis(p_h, c_k) + flea-hole channel α·|θ_QK_h - round-to-half-step(θ_QK_h)| where half-step = π/24 rad. (4) Residual cluster R = {h : d_h > τ} flagged as defective. (5) Repair finetune via projection loss L_proj = sum_{h in R} ||p_h - c_k*(h)||^2 where c_k*(h) is nearest centroid. (6) Differs from R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT (graph-minor canonical motif catalog) by spectrum-profile-centroid representation + flea-hole half-step angle deviation channel + mahalanobis residual identification rather than graph-isomorphism subgraph matching.
llm_application: BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS attention-head canonical-spectrum-profile centroid catalog + flea-hole half-step θ_QK deviation channel + mahalanobis residual-cluster defect score + projection-to-nearest-centroid repair finetune. Differs from R103 KNOT-CoT (TDA on CoT, distinct). R475 MAEDEUP-KNOT-J (knot-crossing catalog per row). R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT (closest — graph-minor isomorphism catalog, but spectrum-centroid + flea-hole half-step specific). R489 MEDALLION-ROT-DEFECT (rotation equivariance, distinct). Differs from Attention Head Survey 2409.03752 (closest — taxonomy not centroid-atlas). Differs from Attention Head Entropy ICLR 2025 (entropy not spectrum-shape centroid). Head Pruning literature (different — drop heads, not centroid-fit defect). Differs by SPECTRUM-CENTROID ATLAS + FLEA-HOLE HALF-STEP ANGLE DEVIATION CHANNEL + MAHALANOBIS RESIDUAL DEFECT IDENTIFICATION.
novelty_claim: Attention Head Survey + Entropy + Pruning + Mech-Interp cover taxonomy/defect/repair space. BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS adds (a) singular-spectrum centroid representation + (b) flea-hole half-step (π/24 rad) θ_QK deviation channel + (c) mahalanobis residual-cluster defect identification + (d) projection-to-nearest-centroid repair finetune. Recombination — borderline lookup.
